## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content updates, performance reports, and website redesign feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 605 articles live by Saturday; Vivek OOO next week, but coverage maintained](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [New Luka dashboards introduced with comprehensive performance metrics (GA4, GSC data)](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Datagrid's new website mock-up shared; GrowthX team to provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Link building progress: 25 new backlinks last month, organic traction improving](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)

## Topics

### Content and Performance Updates

  - [605 articles live by Saturday, on schedule](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Revamped Luka dashboards introduced:](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Overall tab: website/URL performance, organic/referral data from GA4](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Non-branded clicks/impressions tab](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Conversion events tab (customizable)](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [Cohorts tab: topic-based breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Landing pages and queries tabs for detailed exploration](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [LLM tab: spike in LLM referrals (17% of traffic, considered very good)](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Performance matched previous week; slight dip in non-branded impressions](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [New content pillars starting publication this week](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Website Redesign Feedback

  - [Datagrid shared new website mock-up (focus on homepage)](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [GrowthX team (Mara, Jason, Marcel) to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Feedback options: direct comments, Notion page, or Loom video](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [New design includes interactive product demo on homepage](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Significant expansion planned for site depth and breadth](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

### Link Building and Thought Leadership

  - [25 new backlinks through paid channels last month](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Organic link acquisition improving; stats blogs performing well](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Thought leadership meeting scheduled post-sync](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Mara sent questions for review; exploring Assembly AI leads/use cases](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [New format: Questions shared Monday, discussed in free-flowing conversation](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Thiago positive about question format, sees writing collaboration improving](https://fathom.video/share/uiP8jvwMCJ-KCt37CDCZGio4vs1S4dzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
